final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: documentary street photography, landscape orientation
Primary request: Ganges River morning bathing ritual in Varanasi, India — devout pilgrims performing holy bath at dawn
Scene/backdrop: Varanasi ghats along the Ganges River at sunrise, morning mist hovering over the water, wooden boats silhouetted in the haze
Subject: devout Hindu pilgrims wading into the sacred Ganges, draped in colorful wet saris and dhotis, hands clasped in prayer, faces expressing deep reverence and devotion
Style/medium: documentary photojournalism, 35mm film photography, photorealistic
Composition/framing: wide establishing shot with layered depth — foreground pilgrims in water, midground boats in mist, background temple spires; slight low angle, 35mm lens
Lighting/mood: warm golden sunrise light breaking through soft morning fog, long raking shadows, spiritual and contemplative atmosphere, hazy diffused glow over the river
Color palette: warm amber and gold sunlight, soft grey-blue morning mist, deep saffron and crimson of pilgrims' garments, muted earthy tones of the ghats
Materials/textures: wet stone steps of the ghats, rippling river surface reflecting golden light, worn wooden boats, wet draped fabric clinging to figures
Constraints: preserve the authentic cultural atmosphere of Varanasi; no tourists or modern intrusions; boats must be traditional wooden rowboats in the mist
Avoid: oversaturated HDR look, posed or staged appearance, plastic skin tones, watermark
